prompt: Can you audit our Storybook and tell me if any stories have drifted from the code? We reorganized the token files into three tiers a while back and I'm not sure everything got updated. Give me a report of anything stale, then fix what you find.

assertions.text: Detects the button.stories.tsx CSS-variables drift: it lists --primary as the default variant's background/text, but button.tsx now uses bg-button (--button-bg) / text-button-fg / bg-button-hover and rounded-(--button-radius)
Treats the request as a repo-wide audit — checks multiple stories and/or scans for components missing stories, not just one file
Produces a structured report grouped by story file, with specific token/variant names and file references
Does not fabricate drift for stories that are actually in sync (e.g. does not claim the Badge or Colors story is broken when it matches the code)
If it edits button.stories.tsx, the corrected token rows accurately reflect the component's current classes
Catches that button.stories.tsx argTypes.size.options omits the `icon-xs` size that exists in the component's cva (thoroughness on variant coverage, not just tokens)
